results.title: George Russell left sweating despite Austria GP win as Mercedes encounter 'surprise' issue
results.description: George Russell won the Austrian Grand Prix from pole but it was not a straightforward win.

results.title: Cricket-Australia knock India out to reach Women's T20 World Cup semis
results.description: June 28 (Reuters) - India were knocked out ⁠of the Women's T20 World Cup after Australia's Ellyse Perry and Ashleigh Gardner ⁠struck half-centuries to secure a six-wicket win at Lord's on Sunday.

results.title: Australia knock out biggest rivals at T20 World Cup
results.description: Australia have powered ruthlessly into the semi-finals of the Women's T20 World Cup, hammering India by six wickets at Lord's to maintain their unbeaten record while sending their biggest rivals spinning out of the tournament.

results.title: Dockers backman feels the love as win streak hits 14
Wins for Cork and Galway put last year’s finalists through to the senior camogie semi-finals
results.description: Glen Dimplex senior championship Group One Cork 1-13 Waterford 0-10 Galway 3-17 Tipperary 0-15

results.title: Boston Celtics expected to add former San Antonio Spurs two way guard Kyle Mangas
results.description: The 6-foot-4, 200-lb. 27-year-old is reportedly joining the Sin City Celtics in Las Vegas this summer.

results.title: WATCH: Abhishek Sharma Fan Gets His Autograph On Her Arm To Get It Tattooed Ahead Of India Vs Ireland 2nd T20I In Belfast
results.description: Abhishek happily agreed and signed her arm with a marker before the fan left to get the signature inked as a tattoo. The moment was captured on video and quickly went viral on social media, with many fans reacting to the level of admiration shown for the Indian cricketer.

results.title: Eugenio Chacarra Takes Commanding Lead at Open d'Italia
results.description: Eugenio Chacarra has taken a commanding lead at the Open d'Italia, showcasing remarkable skill with a six-under 65. As he aims for his second title of the season, the competition remains fierce with Joaquin Niemann and Matt Wallace closely trailing. With changes to the final round schedule due to weather forecasts, the excitement builds as Chacarra prepares to defend his lead. Discover the details of this thrilling tournament and the players vying for victory.
